prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GSC130MSSPPWFP-2PC-SML-GRN-4 Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Gold Sifting Classifier 1/30 inch Mesh Screen Sieve Prospect Pan Description: A must-have item for gold panning and mineral recovery, this classification screen will aid your efforts by sorting your raw materials based on size.

This extra small particle screen is made of tough, high-impact plastic and 0.1mm stainless steel wire. This design is made to fit easily into a 5 gallon bucket and it matches the size of our 14" gold pans to allow easy transfer of materials from one to the other.

Although gold is heavy, small flakes will not be able to displace larger rocks from your initial sample. Screening or "classifying" material into groups based on size will ensure that any gold, whether nuggets or flakes, will not get lost. In addition, looking through similar sized materials is a faster and more effective way to sort and will speed up the panning process, resulting in more gold.

This 1/30" mesh size is perfect for fine cleanup of gold flakes, or coarse preparation for a gravity concentrator bowl Search Terms: gold rush equipment; gold panning accessories; prospecting equipment; classifier screen set; mealworm sifting screen Features: - 304 Stainless Steel Wire - Wire Thickness - 0.1mm - Mesh Size - 1/30"- 900 Holes per Square Inch - Fits on a 5 Gallon Bucket - Compact and Stackable === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Gold Sifting Classifier 1/30 Mesh Screen

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 1/30 in Gold Sifting Classifier Screen Sieve

anthropic.title_differentiation: 130 Inch Mesh, 304 Stainless Steel, Fits 5 Gallon Bucket, Stackable, Gold Panning

openai.title_differentiation: 304 Stainless Steel Wire, 01Mm Wire Thickness, 900 Holes Per Square Inch, Fits 5 Gallon Bucket, Stackable
